Update: Update available! Jab here t' start it.
Steam_Tray_AccountName: Show account name [nah yer matey name]
Steam_StartSilent: Open Steam t' task tray on switch (Start Steam wit' '-silent')
Steam_CollectInfo: Collect profile images and VAC ban status from Steam
Settings_SteamCollectInfo: Plunder Steam Flag Picture & VAC Standin' from Steam
Settings_ImageExpiry: Days afore yer profile paintin' expire:
Settings_SteamAPIKey: Steam Web API key (if ye wish)
Settings_SteamAPIKey_Note: Settin' an API key will make the Limited indicator (yellow border) show fer Cap'n's that are Community Banished instead.
Settings_TrayMax: Max number o' accounts t' remember:
Settings_OfflineMode: Off the grid mode (No network activity)
Settings_AutoStart: Automatically set sail {platform} on crew swap
Settings_ShowSteamSwitcher: Show Steam's account switcher (Do NAH use dis or it may break the TcNo Account Switcher)
Settings_NoPlatforms: Thar are currently no platforms enabled. Please tick optional platforms below t' enable 'em, or uncheck disabled platforms.
Settings_PreviewCss: 'tis the CSS preview page. Ye can view some elements that elder up in the program 'n see wha' they look like wit' yer theme. This page be useful fer those creatin' new paint!
Cleaning_ImportantInfo:
Skewerin' a button will scuttle the related file(s) from yer Steam installation.
Scuttlin' loginusers.vdf will result in this Cap'n switcher showin' no Cap'ns.
Ye will needs t' login t' 'em usin' Steam t' get 'em back.
Cleaning_Understand: I understand wha' these buttons do.
Restore_Info:
If ye previously "forgot" a Cap'n, ye can restore 'em here.
This adds 'em back into yer loginusers.vdf file, allowin' ye t' switch t' 'em.
Toast_DataLocationNotCopying: (1/2) Folder already has files! Will nah migrate ye user data.
Toast_DataLocationSet: (2/2) Restart the Cap'n switcher t' use the new folder!
Toast_PlaceShortcutFiles: A folder be openin'. Galleon game shortcuts in that folder, 'n restart the Cap'n switcher.
Toast_ProtocolEnabled: This program will now respond t' tcno:\\ in Windows
Toast_ProtocolDisabled: This program will no longer respond t' tcno:\\
Toast_RestartAsAdmin: Please start as Admin 'n try again.
Toast_SettingsCopied: Settings successfully copied t' current account.
Toast_GameDataRestored: Successfully restored game data fer this account.
Toast_NoValidSteamId: Unable t' find a valid Steam ID.
Toast_Steam_VacCleared: VAC status fer accounts was cleared
Toast_NoFindGameBackup: Unable t' find backup game data folder fer this account.
Toast_FailedStatsLoad: Failed t' load GameStats.json! Please verify this file exists.
Toast_GameStatsLoadFail: Failed t' get game stats from web fer {Game}
Toast_UpdateCheckFail: Could nah reach https://tcno.co/ t' check fer updates. This message will show once a day.
Toast_SameAccount: Can nah copy files t'/from the same Cap'n. Try a different Cap'n, or see Wiki fer more info.
Toast_FoundExeViaShortcut: Avast! We found the installed path from a Start Menu shortcut. Please verify it's location by skewerin' Settings now. Skewer t' dismiss.
Modal_Crowdin_Info:
Here's everyone who helped translate this software.
Users wit' languages next t' 'em helped a lot in translation (proofreader role).
Modal_GameVars_Header: Enter the followin' details fer yer {game} Cap'n, {username} on {platform}
Modal_SetBackground:
Select an paintin', or enter a URL below.
Leave blank 'n set t' reset.
(Fer more advanced control see the Themin' on the Wiki):
Modal_SetUserdata: Enter a folder path below 'n skewer set.
Modal_ChangeUsername: Enter a new name fer yer Cap'n
Modal_SetPassword: Enter a pass fer th' TcNo Account Switcher, matey.
Toast_UrlAdminErr: Ye can nah run .url files as admin. Try another shortcut type. Launchin' as normal user.
Status_FailedLog: Action failed. See Cap'n's log fer details.
Status_WaitingForMultipleClose: Waitin' fer {processName} & {count} others to scuttle ({timeout}/{timeLimit} seconds)
Title_Settings_TestCss: TcNo Account Switcher - Test CSS Stylin'
Tray_CantOpenExe:
Could nah open the main .exe. Make sure it exists.

I attempted t' open:
Tray_LaunchFail: TcNo Cap'n Switcher - Tray launch fail
Prompt_RestartAsAdmin:
This program will restart as Admin

Hit "Aye" in UAC when prompted fer admin.
Prompt_ForgetAccount:
Ye be about to forget an account!

What does this mean?

TcNo Account Switcher will also nay show th' account,
'til it be signed into again through {platform}, an' added to th' list.

Yer account will remain untouched. It be just forgotten on this here computer.

Do ye understand?
Prompt_ClearStats:
Ye be about t' clear yer statistics!

Ye can nah undo this action.
Tooltip_ShortcutFolder: Open th' shortcut folder. Stash shortcuts in there, an' th' TcNo Account Switcher to spy 'em, arr.
Tooltip_Backup: Backup config files/folders, as defined in port settings.
Tooltip_BackupAll: Backup ALL ye config files/folders, includin' paintin's 'n other large files.
Tooltip_ClosingMethod: Combined be best. Close attempts t' close directly through a close function 'n TaskKill uses CMD (Best if combined doesn't work)
Tooltip_StartingMethod: Default be the best. Direct has no control o'er admin level or UAC. 'twill start as the same level (or higher - but nah lower) than this Cap'n switcher
Tooltip_Restore: Skewer t' select a 7z file, or drag it onto this button.
Tooltip_SteamShowMiniProfile: Fetch th' Steam mini profile HTML in th' background an' show it after hoverin' an account avatar fer one second.
Tooltip_SteamShowAvatarFrame: Plunder the equipped portrait frame from the mini flag page and draw it atop the flag picture.
Tooltip_AddNew: Clear session and board as a new crew
Tooltip_SaveCurrent: Stash the current session as a named crew
Tooltip_Launch: Set sail the ship without swappin' crews
Tooltip_LaunchAfterSwitch: Set sail the ship after swappin' crews to {name}
Toast_StatsReportFailed: Could not load the tallies report.
Modal_SaveCurrent_Body: Enter a display name for this crew:
Settings_LaunchArguments_Hint: Optional extra command-line sail options. For example: '-dev' or '-novid'.
Settings_ResetConfirm: Scuttle all config for {platform} to their defaults?
Settings_ShowLastUsed: Show last used time on crew tiles
Stats_ModalShareEnabled: These tallies are spilled anonymously and be included in the public totals.
Stats_ModalShareDisabled: These tallies be NOT spilled anonymously and be NOT included in the public totals.
SteamAdvanced_LogPlaceholder: Scuttlebutt from each action will appear here.
SteamAdvanced_ClosedSteam: Scuttled Steam (or Steam was not sailin').
Toast_OfflineModeEnabled: Off the grid mode be on: no outbound network calls from the app.
Toast_OfflineModeDisabled: Off the grid mode be off: flag and API refresh can use the network again.
Toast_OfflineModeNoLinks: Off the grid mode be on: open the link from yer browser manually if needed.
Toast_ShortcutImportUnsupported: Only .lnk and .url scrolls can be dropped here
Modal_Body_MissingPlatformsJson: Th' Platforms.json file was not found in th' TcNo Account Switcher folder next to this here program. Choose a file to use, or restore th' default list shipped with th' app, arr.
Context_CreateShortcut_SelectAccount: Create Map Marker (Choose a crew first)
Overlay_ProfileImageHint: Please drag and drop a portrait scroll for the crew: {name}, or click below to choose one.
Context_GameData_NoFolders: No installed title has local game data or a stashed backup for this crew yet.
Settings_PreviewOverlayDropReceivers: Fullscreen receivers and per-crew cues shown while draggin' flag images or map markers. Static spy below match those states.
Toast_CrashReported: A crash report was buried successfully.
Toast_PlatformsJsonUpdateFound: A fresher Platforms.json be ready (v{version}). Haulin' aboard…
Toast_DataLocationSuccess: Yer user data location be updated successfully, arr!
Tooltip_PortableMode: Pressin' this'll move th' TcNo Account Switcher folder right next to th' .exe for travelin' installs, arr!
Modal_Title_MoveUserdata: Pick a location to move yer user data, arr!
Stats_MetricsAffiliationNote: NOTE: This program be not affiliated or endorsed by this website or service.
Overlay_UserDataMove: Copyin' user data to th' new location…
Overlay_UserDataMoveRestarting: Restartin' to finish movin' user data…
Stability_ThumbDown: Nay, th' switch did not work
Feedback_Issue_Body: Describe what went afoul an' what ye expected:
Feedback_Suggestion_Body: Scribble an idea, change or fix in detail:
Modal_CrashReport_Body:
Arr! We be crashed!
Would ye like to send yer crash log to help debug and fix issues?

Take heed: This report may include usernames, account IDs and other info ye entered, or the program be collectin'.
Toast_CrashReportSubmitFailed: Could not send the crash report, matey.
